articles.title: Reliance and Meta to develop AI-enabled data centre in Jamnagar
articles.summary: Reliance Industries and Meta Platforms are joining forces to build a massive 168 MW AI-powered data centre in Jamnagar, Gujarat. This significant collaboration marks India's first built-to-suit facility for Meta, aiming to bolster global AI infrastructure.

articles.title: Centre clears three more foreign universities to establish campuses in India
articles.summary: Three more foreign universities, including the University of Bristol, University of York, and University of New South Wales, have received approval to establish campuses in India. These institutions will set up operations in Mumbai and Bengaluru, offering programs in fields like finance, computer science, and business management, aligning with India's National Education Policy 2020..

articles.title: Kerala Plus One Result 2026: What to do if website crashes— alternative portals
articles.summary: The Kerala Directorate of Higher Secondary Education is expected to release the Plus One (Class 11) results today, June 10, around 3 PM. Over four lakh students await their scorecards, which will be available online.

articles.title: From working in a restaurant to leading HubSpot: Yamini Rangan's journey to the top
articles.summary: Yamini Rangan, an Indian-origin tech executive, rose from engineering studies in India to become the CEO of HubSpot. With over two decades of experience across various tech roles, she now leads the global software company, focusing on innovation and customer experience.

articles.title: Kerala DHSE Plus One result 2026 to be released today: Where and how to download Class 11 marksheets
articles.summary: The Kerala Directorate of Higher Secondary Education is expected to release the Plus One (Class 11) results for 2026 today, June 10, around 3 PM. Students can check their scorecards on official websites, DigiLocker, or via SMS.
